short_description: Training room AC not cooling (1910 N Broadway)
description: The HVAC in the evening training room is not keeping up during cohort sessions; room is uncomfortable by 7 PM.

short_description: Projector in training room will not power on
description: The ceiling projector in the training room does not turn on; needed for Session 1 slides.

short_description: Wi-Fi drops during evening cohort sessions
description: Guest Wi-Fi in the training room drops intermittently after 6:30 PM, affecting the sign-in form.

short_description: Stacking chairs missing from training room
description: About a dozen chairs are missing; the fall cohort needs seating for 16.
